headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .200 / .355 / .200.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 3, TB 5. Josh Rojas led the night, 1-1 | HR, RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 113.0 mph.

player_of_game.name: Josh Rojas
player_of_game.reason: 1-1 | HR, RBI, R in the latest Royals game.
